narrative_beat: Medium over-the-shoulder of smartphone in hand, large 350 score in crimson with descending golden bar, worried face blurred behind

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a modern smartphone held in a hand, screen showing a large three-digit number 350 in blood-red with a descending golden progress bar below
subject.focal_point: the crisp crimson number 350 at screen center
subject.secondary: Behind in blur, an anxious Asian face in P&B watching.

composition.foreground: screen score in rich blood-red and gold
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white face and subway behind

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.secondary: number as verdict on human worth

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

in_scene_text.font_style: bold modern digital display numerals in blood-crimson
in_scene_text.medium: illuminated LED-style display on smartphone screen
in_scene_text.placement: center of smartphone screen, large and dominant

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
